identity.title: Silence makes the wild visible.
identity.description: Mountain Fauna Lover documents the pauses between movement: a distant silhouette, snow crossing a ridge, a breath held behind the lens.
identity.quote: The animal stays in its world. I stay in mine. The lens becomes the bridge.

founder.title: A life shaped by looking closer.
founder.description: I’m Mattioli Simone, a mountain and wildlife enthusiast from Trentino-Alto Adige, documenting alpine nature through digiscoping, skiing, e-bike adventures and vlogs.

story.title: The mountain taught me to wait.
story.p1: I’m Mattioli Simone, a mountain and wildlife enthusiast from Trentino-Alto Adige. Through Mountain Fauna Lover, I document alpine nature through digiscoping, skiing, e-bike adventures and cinematic videos.
story.p2: My world is shaped by silence, patience and observation: the quiet moments before an animal appears, the cold air of winter mornings, the geometry of mountain ridges, and the respect required to enter wild places without disturbing them.
story.p3: Mountain Fauna Lover is my way of sharing that world: a 360° vision of the Alps, from wildlife and snow to technology, exploration and storytelling. Val di Rabbi and Stelvio National Park are not just locations; they are part of the rhythm of the work.
story.developer: Alongside mountain storytelling, I am also a software developer. This allows me to combine nature, technology and creativity — building digital experiences that reflect the same precision and curiosity I bring into the mountains.

observation.title: Observation
observation.description: Entering quietly, staying distant and noticing what the mountain reveals.

mountain.title: Movement
mountain.description: Skiing and e-bike exploration as ways to understand alpine terrain.

technology.title: Technology
technology.description: Optics, cameras and software used with precision, never as a substitute for patience.

digiscoping.title: The lens is a bridge, not an invitation.
digiscoping.description: Digiscoping is the art of filming or photographing through a spotting scope. For me, it is a practice of patience, precision and respect.

meaning.title: Closer images. Greater distance.
meaning.p1: Digiscoping is the art of filming or photographing through a spotting scope. For me, it is more than a technique: it is a way to observe wildlife from distance, with patience and respect.
meaning.p2: Instead of getting closer, digiscoping allows the mountain to remain undisturbed. The animal stays in its world. I stay in mine. The lens becomes the bridge between the two.

distance.title: Keep the distance
distance.description: The image is never worth changing an animal’s behavior. Magnification replaces physical approach.

patience.title: Let time pass
patience.description: Observation is measured in stillness. The moment arrives on the mountain’s schedule, not ours.

respect.title: Leave no pressure
respect.description: No call, chase or forced encounter. Record what is freely visible and leave quietly.

respect.title: Respect before the shot.
respect.description: A powerful image begins with restraint. If the animal notices, changes direction or becomes alert, the observation has already moved too close.

collaboration.title: Build something true to the mountain.
collaboration.description: Mountain Fauna Lover is available for selected collaborations with brands, tourism boards, outdoor projects and creators who share a respect for the mountains, wildlife and authentic storytelling.

privacy.title: Privacy, kept clear.
privacy.description: What information this website handles, why it is used and the choices available to every visitor.

controller.title: Who manages the data
controller.body: Mountain Fauna Lover, founded by Mattioli Simone, manages the data submitted through this website. Privacy questions can be sent to mattioli.simone.10@gmail.com.

contact.title: Contact form data
contact.body: When you submit the collaboration form, the website processes your name, email address, optional organization, collaboration type and message only to review and respond to your request. Privacy consent is required before submission.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.body: Vercel Analytics may collect aggregated technical and usage information. Google Analytics loads only when an administrator configures NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_ID. No advertising pixels or cross-site advertising profiles are used in version one.

retention.title: Retention and sharing
retention.body: Contact information is retained only for as long as reasonably needed to manage the conversation or collaboration. Data is not sold. Service providers such as Vercel and Resend process limited data only to host the site and deliver messages.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on applicable law, you may request access, correction, deletion, restriction or portability of your personal data, or object to processing. Contact the email above to make a request.

security.title: Security and updates
security.body: Reasonable technical safeguards are used, but no internet transmission is completely risk-free. This notice may be updated when site features, analytics or legal requirements change.

cookies.title: Cookies without noise.
cookies.description: A concise record of the preferences and measurement tools this experience may store.

banner.label: Analytics preference
banner.title: A quiet choice about analytics.
banner.description: Optional Google Analytics stays off unless you allow it. Essential language and session preferences still work.

essential.title: Essential operation
essential.body: The site uses technically necessary storage for routing and session behavior. The intro completion flag is stored in sessionStorage so the logo portal does not replay aggressively during the same visit.

language.title: Language preference
language.body: The MFL_LOCALE cookie remembers whether you selected English or Italian. Browser language is used for the first automatic redirect when no preference exists.

analytics.title: Analytics cookies
analytics.body: Vercel Analytics is enabled for privacy-conscious aggregate measurement. Google Analytics is optional and loads only when NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_ID is configured and the visitor allows analytics; it may then use its own measurement cookies.

sound.title: Sound preference
sound.body: The optional alpine ambience remains off until you interact with its control. A localStorage preference may remember whether the sound was enabled or disabled. Sound never autoplays with audio on.

control.title: Your control
control.body: You can clear cookies and local storage in your browser settings. Blocking preference storage may cause language, intro or sound choices to reset, but the main website remains available.
